design_intent: Create a minimal fictional site workflow that demonstrates parcel hierarchy, open space, and mobility logic without representing a real building proposal.

hierarchy_rules.description: Use B-01 as the primary massing test parcel.
Use B-02 as a secondary mixed-use massing test parcel.

open_space_rules.description: Keep D-02 as open space in the minimal test.

mobility_rules.description: Use one fictional east-west access line for preview only.

landscape_rules.description: Use open space parcel as landscape placeholder.

building_groups.notes: Embedded here for the minimal sample. Production projects can use a separate building_groups.json.

notes: Fictional rule sample for system demonstration only.
